display_name: SNTL: DePIN Spatial Intelligence & Autonomous x402 DataLake
target_audience: Autonomous AI Agents, DePIN Fleet Managers, Systems Architects
description: SNTL is an enterprise-grade, autonomous spatial intelligence and cryptographic security engine engineered for high-throughput Decentralized Physical Infrastructure Networks (DePIN). Utilizing native x402 HTTP micro-payment protocols for automated machine-to-machine billing, SNTL ingests raw Solana SVM substreams and real-time network telemetry to deliver low-latency RF anomaly detection, predictive yield-loss forensics, and automated threat mitigation vectors.
